name: FeelWorld P6X 5.5" 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor
description: The P6X 5.5" 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor from FeelWorld provides an on-camera monitoring solution while shooting in the field.

features.Key Features:: 5.5" 1920 x 1080 Resolution Display | 1000 cd/m² Brightness | 4K HDMI Input and Output | 160° Viewing Angle | Up to 32 Custom 3D LUTs | NP-F Series Battery Plate | 8 VDC Output for Powering Camera | Three 1/4"-20 Threads, Cold Shoe Adapter
